creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
games/jfduke3d is not being developed any longer is should be removed. the games/eduke32 port provides a much better alternative.

cheers.
alex

ps: if a committer decides that this port should stay please update the maintainer's mail address in the Makefile to "arundel@freebsd.org" since the current address bounces.
